FAQ

Frequently asked questions about WowBox

🛒 Purchase & Boxes

Browse our collection, choose a box, add to cart and complete checkout. Your digital gift box is delivered immediately by email.
Yes! During checkout you can send immediately or schedule for a specific date — perfect for birthdays and anniversaries.
All major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Paystack. All transactions are secure and encrypted.
Yes! During checkout add a personalised text message, or add a video message as an optional extra for an even more special touch.

📦 E-Box Delivery

WowBox is fully digital — all gift boxes are delivered by email as an E-Box. Instant delivery anywhere in South Africa.
The recipient receives a beautifully designed email with their unique voucher code. They visit wowbox.co.za, enter their code, and choose their experience.

🎟️ Voucher Activation

Go to wowbox.co.za, click "Redeem a Box", enter your unique voucher code and unlock all the experiences in your box.
You can activate without an account, but creating a free account lets you save your box, track your booking and access your voucher anytime.
Check your email inbox for the original gift email. If you can't find it, contact us at support@wowbox.co.za with your name and purchase details.

📅 Booking Experiences

After activating your voucher, browse the experiences in your box, pick one, select date & time, and confirm your booking directly on the platform.
Each experience specifies the guests included (Solo, Duo, or Group). For additional guests, contact the experience provider directly.
Yes, subject to availability. Contact the experience provider at least 48 hours before your booking. Each partner has their own cancellation policy.

⏳ Validity & Expiration

WowBox vouchers are valid for 12 months from purchase date. We send reminder emails before expiry.
Expired vouchers cannot be reactivated. If you have exceptional circumstances, contact our support team.

💰 Refunds & Cancellations

Unopened vouchers (not yet activated) can be refunded within 30 days of purchase. Once activated, refunds are subject to the experience provider's policy.
Yes, within 14 days of purchase and before activation, you can request an exchange for a box of equal or greater value. Contact support@wowbox.co.za.

🎬 Video Message

For a small extra fee, record a personal video message that the recipient watches when they open their gift.
Up to 2 minutes. Record directly in your browser or upload a pre-recorded video.

🤝 For Partners

Click "List Your Experience" in the footer. Create a partner account, submit your experience for review and our team will contact you within 5 business days.
Listing is free. WowBox takes a small commission on completed bookings. Premium features are available via our Pro Plan.
In your Partner Portal, go to "My Bookings". When a customer arrives, click "Validate" and enter their voucher code to mark it as used.

Still have a question?

Contact Us

We usually respond within 24 hours.

Gift Boxes

Find the perfect gift box! Browse our 12 curated collections and explore over 140,000 activities from our partners. Choose between instant e-delivery or premium physical packaging.

Terms & Conditions

WowBox Terms and Conditions of Sale — Effective 27 April 2026

WowBox is a trading name of RC Tradeworx Holdings (Pty) Ltd, reg. 2025/174107/07, 29 North Road, Benoni, Gauteng, 1514. Contact: info@wowbox.co.za

1. Eligibility. You must be at least 18 years old to purchase a WowBox product. Persons under 18 may only participate when accompanied by a parent or legal guardian. No refund shall be provided if admission is refused due to age.

2. About WowBox. WowBox acts solely as an intermediary between customers and independent third-party experience providers ("Participating Partners"). WowBox does not own, operate, or supervise any experience or venue provided by Participating Partners.

3. Orders & Acceptance. An order is only accepted once payment has been successfully processed and the WowBox product issued. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order at our sole discretion.

4. Pricing & Payment. All prices are in ZAR and include VAT where applicable. Payment must be received in full before delivery.

5. Delivery. Digital products are delivered electronically to the email address provided. Physical delivery timeframes are estimates only. WowBox is not liable for courier delays.

6. Voucher Activation & Redemption. Each product contains a unique activation code. Activated vouchers are non-transferable unless expressly permitted.

7. Booking & Availability. All experiences are subject to availability determined solely by the Participating Partner. WowBox does not guarantee availability of any experience, date, or time.

8. Experience Changes. Participating Partners may modify, substitute, or discontinue any experience at any time. WowBox may substitute an equivalent experience where reasonably possible.

9. Validity. Vouchers are valid for the period stated. Expired vouchers may not be redeemed unless required by law.

10. Participating Partner Responsibility. Partners are solely responsible for delivering the experience, maintaining licences, health & safety, insurance, and service quality. Complaints must be addressed directly with the Partner.

11. Insurance. WowBox does not provide any form of insurance. Customers are solely responsible for obtaining any insurance they deem necessary.

12. Assumption of Risk. Certain experiences involve inherent risks including physical injury or death. Participation is voluntary. You assume all risks associated with participation. WowBox shall not be liable for any injury, loss, or death arising from participation.

13. Fitness to Participate. You are solely responsible for ensuring all participants are fit to participate. Partners may refuse participation where unsafe. No refund shall be due in such circumstances.

14. Refusal of Admission. No refund, exchange, or compensation shall be payable where a Participating Partner refuses admission due to: age restrictions; failure to present valid ID; intoxication; inappropriate behaviour; safety concerns; dress code violations; medical concerns; or any other lawful reason.

15. Additional Costs. Unless stated otherwise, the following are excluded: transportation, accommodation, meals, gratuities, insurance, taxes, personal expenses, and optional extras.

16. Cancellation & Refunds. Subject to applicable South African consumer protection laws: activated, redeemed, expired, and partially used vouchers are non-refundable. Digital products may not be refunded once delivered, except where required by law. Each experience has its own free-cancellation window (shown at the time of booking, typically 24 hours to 14 days before the experience). Once a booking is confirmed and that window has passed, the booking cannot be modified, rebooked, or cancelled, and the voucher is forfeited.

17. Lost / Stolen Vouchers. WowBox is not responsible for lost, stolen, or unauthorised use of vouchers. Treat your voucher like cash.

18. Fraud & Abuse. WowBox reserves the right to cancel any order or account where fraud or abuse is suspected.

19. Limitation of Liability. To the fullest extent permitted by law, WowBox shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability shall never exceed the purchase price paid.

20. Force Majeure. WowBox is not liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control including natural disasters, pandemics, government action, or cyberattacks.

21. Indemnity. You agree to indemnify WowBox and its directors, officers, and employees from any claims arising from your breach of these Terms, misuse of any product, or participation in any experience.

22. Intellectual Property. All content on the WowBox website is owned by or licensed to WowBox. No content may be copied or used without prior written consent.

23. Privacy. Your personal information will be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy and applicable South African data protection laws.

24. Governing Law. These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the South African courts.

25. Amendments. WowBox may amend these Terms at any time. The version published at the time of purchase shall apply.

You must accept the Terms & Conditions to continue.
Your payment is processed securely by Paystack. WowBox never stores your card details.

Unique Booking Reference —

Present this code at the venue to redeem your experience

How to use your voucher
  1. Call ahead — contact the venue by phone to confirm your booking date and time before visiting.
  2. Bring this voucher — print it or show it on your phone at the venue for validation.
  3. Enjoy! — present your unique booking reference code on arrival.
This voucher is non-transferable. Must be presented on arrival. Cancellations must be made 48h before. WowBox T&Cs apply.

FOR EXPERIENCE PROVIDERS

Turn your space into an
unforgettable experience

Join South Africa's leading gift experience platform. Reach thousands of premium customers actively seeking hotels, restaurants, spas, safaris and more.

Who can list on WowBox?
From boutique hotels to bush lodges — if you offer an exceptional experience, you belong here.
🏨 Hotels & Lodges
🍽️ Restaurants
🧖 Spas & Wellness
🦁 Safaris
🥾 Hiking & Nature
Why partner with WowBox?
Everything you need to grow your business through gifting.
🎯

Premium audience

Our customers are gift-givers actively looking to spend on quality experiences — hotels, dining, wellness and adventure.

💸

Guaranteed payment

You get paid when a customer redeems their voucher. No chasing invoices, no cancellations — just confirmed revenue.

📊

Your own dashboard

Validate vouchers instantly, track redemptions and monitor your performance — all in one place, from any device.

🚀

Zero upfront cost

Listing on WowBox is completely free. We only succeed when you do — it is a true partnership.

🌍

National reach

WowBox customers are spread across South Africa. Reach people in Cape Town, Johannesburg, Durban and beyond.

⭐

Curated and trusted

We hand-pick every experience on the platform. Being listed signals quality to thousands of discerning customers.

How it works
Up and running in minutes.
1

Create your profile

Register your business, add photos and describe your offering. Our team reviews and approves within 24 hours.

2

Get discovered

Your experience appears in WowBox gift packs matched to your category and region.

3

Welcome your guests

Scan or enter the customer's WB code in your Partner Portal to confirm the booking.

4

Get paid

Payment is processed automatically after validation. Funds transferred within 2 business days.

Ready to grow your business?

Join hundreds of South African experience providers already on WowBox. Create your partner account in minutes — our team will review and approve your listing within 24 hours.

What can you list on WowBox?

Any premium experience that creates lasting memories.

How it works

📋

1. Create your profile

Tell us about your business, your experiences, and what makes you special.

🎁

2. Get discovered

Your experience is included in WowBox gift collections sold across South Africa.

💳

3. Welcome your guests

Validate vouchers in your partner portal and get paid. Simple, fast, reliable.

Partner access

Sign in to your portal or apply to join WowBox.

Forgot password?

Applications are reviewed within 48 hours. You will receive a confirmation email.

🌐 Connect your own domain

Buy a domain (e.g. experiences.yourbrand.com) and redirect it to your WowBox page. Visitors who go to your domain will be taken to your WowBox page.

⏱ DNS changes can take up to 48 hours to propagate worldwide.

Commissions

Configure commission rates. Priority: experience-level → partner-level → global default.

Applied to all validations that don't have a partner or experience-specific override.

      Legal
      
Terms & Conditions

      
Effective 27 April 2026 — WowBox is a trading name of RC Tradeworx Holdings (Pty) Ltd, reg. 2025/174107/07, 29 North Road, Benoni, Gauteng, 1514. Contact: info@wowbox.co.za

      

    

    

      
1. Eligibility
You must be at least 18 years old to purchase a WowBox product. Persons under 18 may only participate when accompanied by a parent or legal guardian. No refund shall be provided if admission is refused due to age.

      
2. About WowBox
WowBox acts solely as an intermediary between customers and independent third-party experience providers ("Participating Partners"). WowBox does not own, operate, or supervise any experience or venue provided by Participating Partners.

      
3. Orders & Acceptance
An order is only accepted once payment has been successfully processed and the WowBox product issued. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order at our sole discretion.

      
4. Pricing & Payment
All prices are in ZAR and include VAT where applicable. Payment must be received in full before delivery.

      
5. Delivery
Digital products are delivered electronically to the email address provided. Physical delivery timeframes are estimates only. WowBox is not liable for courier delays.

      
6. Voucher Activation & Redemption
Each product contains a unique activation code. Activated vouchers are non-transferable unless expressly permitted.

      
7. Booking & Availability
All experiences are subject to availability determined solely by the Participating Partner. WowBox does not guarantee availability of any experience, date, or time.

      
8. Experience Changes
Participating Partners may modify, substitute, or discontinue any experience at any time. WowBox may substitute an equivalent experience where reasonably possible.

      
9. Validity
Vouchers are valid for 12 months from the date of purchase. Expired vouchers may not be redeemed unless required by law.

      
10. Participating Partner Responsibility
Partners are solely responsible for delivering the experience, maintaining licences, health & safety, insurance, and service quality. Complaints must be addressed directly with the Partner.

      
11. Insurance
WowBox does not provide any form of insurance. Customers are solely responsible for obtaining any insurance they deem necessary.

      
12. Assumption of Risk
Certain experiences involve inherent risks including physical injury or death. Participation is voluntary. You assume all risks associated with participation. WowBox shall not be liable for any injury, loss, or death arising from participation.

      
13. Fitness to Participate
You are solely responsible for ensuring all participants are fit to participate. Partners may refuse participation where unsafe. No refund shall be due in such circumstances.

      
14. Refusal of Admission
No refund, exchange, or compensation shall be payable where a Participating Partner refuses admission due to: age restrictions; failure to present valid ID; intoxication; inappropriate behaviour; safety concerns; dress code violations; medical concerns; or any other lawful reason.

      
15. Additional Costs
Unless stated otherwise, the following are excluded: transportation, accommodation, meals, gratuities, insurance, taxes, personal expenses, and optional extras.

      
16. Cancellation & Refunds
Subject to applicable South African consumer protection laws: activated, redeemed, expired, and partially used vouchers are non-refundable. Digital products may not be refunded once delivered, except where required by law. Each experience has its own free-cancellation window (shown at the time of booking, typically 24 hours to 14 days before the experience). Once a booking is confirmed and that window has passed, the booking cannot be modified, rebooked, or cancelled, and the voucher is forfeited.

      
17. Lost / Stolen Vouchers
WowBox is not responsible for lost, stolen, or unauthorised use of vouchers. Treat your voucher like cash.

      
18. Fraud & Abuse
WowBox reserves the right to cancel any order or account where fraud or abuse is suspected.

      
19. Limitation of Liability
To the fullest extent permitted by law, WowBox shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability shall never exceed the purchase price paid.

      
20. Force Majeure
WowBox is not liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control including natural disasters, pandemics, government action, or cyberattacks.

      
21. Indemnity
You agree to indemnify WowBox and its directors, officers, and employees from any claims arising from your breach of these Terms, misuse of any product, or participation in any experience.

      
22. Intellectual Property
All content on the WowBox website is owned by or licensed to WowBox. No content may be copied or used without prior written consent.

      
23. Privacy
Your personal information will be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy and applicable South African data protection laws (POPIA).

      
24. Governing Law
These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the South African courts.

      
25. Amendments
WowBox may amend these Terms at any time. The version published at the time of purchase shall apply.

    

    

      
      
      
    

  







  

    

      Legal
      
Privacy Policy

      
Effective 27 April 2026 — RC Tradeworx Holdings (Pty) Ltd · info@wowbox.co.za

      

    

    

      
1. Who We Are
WowBox is a trading name of RC Tradeworx Holdings (Pty) Ltd. We operate the WowBox platform at wowbox.co.za and are the responsible party for your personal information under the Protection of Personal Information Act 4 of 2013 (POPIA).

      
2. What We Collect
We collect the following personal information: full name, email address, phone number, delivery address (for physical orders), payment reference numbers, booking details, and any messages or content you choose to share (personal messages, video messages). We do not store card details — payments are processed securely by Paystack.

      
3. Why We Collect It
We use your information to: process and fulfil your orders; send digital vouchers and gift experiences; communicate booking confirmations and updates; provide customer support; improve our platform; comply with legal obligations.

      
4. How We Store It
Your data is stored securely on Supabase (PostgreSQL database hosted in the EU) with row-level security policies. Access is restricted to authorised personnel only. We retain your data for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal requirements.

      
5. Who We Share It With
We share the minimum necessary information with: Participating Partners (experience providers) to facilitate bookings; Paystack for payment processing; Resend for transactional email delivery; Vercel for website hosting. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

      
6. Video Messages
Video messages you upload are stored securely in Supabase Storage and are accessible only via a unique private link. Videos expire automatically after 30 days from purchase.

      
7. Your Rights (POPIA)
Under POPIA you have the right to: access your personal information; request correction of inaccurate information; request deletion of your information (subject to legal obligations); object to processing; lodge a complaint with the Information Regulator. To exercise these rights, contact info@wowbox.co.za.

      
8. Cookies
We use essential cookies only to maintain your session and cart. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, though this may affect functionality.

      
9. Security
We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorised access, disclosure, or loss. However, no internet transmission is completely secure.

      
10. Changes to This Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The current version will always be available at wowbox.co.za/privacy. Material changes will be communicated by email.

      
11. Contact
For any privacy-related queries or to exercise your rights, contact our Information Officer at info@wowbox.co.za or write to: RC Tradeworx Holdings (Pty) Ltd, 29 North Road, Benoni, Gauteng, 1514, South Africa.

    

    

      
      
      
    

  







  

    

      Legal
      
Refund Policy

      
Effective 27 April 2026 — Questions? support@wowbox.co.za

      

    

    

      

        
Summary

        
WowBox vouchers are valid for 12 months from purchase. Booking cancellations are accepted up to 24 hours before the experience. Refunds are handled case by case — contact us at support@wowbox.co.za.

      

      
1. Voucher Validity
All WowBox vouchers are valid for 12 months from the date of purchase. We send a reminder email 30 days before your voucher expires. Expired vouchers cannot be redeemed.

      
2. Booking Cancellation
You may cancel a confirmed booking up to 24 hours before the scheduled experience. Cancellations made within 24 hours of the experience are non-refundable. When you cancel a booking, your voucher is automatically reactivated and you can rebook a different experience or date.

      
3. Refund Eligibility
Refunds may be considered in the following circumstances: the experience is cancelled by the Participating Partner with no suitable alternative; the experience delivered was materially different from its description; a technical error on our platform resulted in a duplicate charge. Refunds are not available for: change of mind after purchase; failure to cancel within the permitted window; vouchers that have been fully redeemed; expired vouchers.

      
4. Refusal of Admission
No refund will be issued if a Participating Partner refuses admission for any lawful reason including but not limited to: age restrictions; intoxication; inappropriate behaviour; failure to present valid identification; medical or safety concerns. This is a condition of purchase agreed to at checkout.

      
5. How to Request a Refund
To request a refund, contact us at support@wowbox.co.za with your order number and a description of the issue. We aim to respond within 2 business days. Approved refunds are processed within 5–10 business days and credited to your original payment method via Paystack.

      
6. Partial Refunds
Where an order contains multiple boxes, refunds may be issued for individual boxes. The remaining boxes in the order are unaffected.

      
7. Consumer Protection Act
Nothing in this policy limits your rights under the Consumer Protection Act 68 of 2008 or any other applicable South African legislation.

      Legal
      
Partner Terms & Conditions

      
Effective 27 April 2026 — WowBox is a trading name of RC Tradeworx Holdings (Pty) Ltd, reg. 2025/174107/07

      

        
      

      

        
      

    

  

  

    

      
      

        
Become a WowBox Partner

        
Become a Partner and reach thousands of gift buyers

      

      

        

          

          

          

          

          

            
          

          

          

            
          

          

        

        

        

        

          Partner Terms & Conditions — Effective 27 April 2026
          WowBox is a trading name of RC Tradeworx Holdings (Pty) Ltd, reg. 2025/174107/07.


          1. Eligibility. You must be at least 18 years old and legally authorised to represent your business.


          2. Partner Role. WowBox acts as an intermediary platform. You retain full responsibility for delivering your experience as described.


          3. Listings. All experience listings must be accurate, legal, and comply with South African law. WowBox reserves the right to remove listings at any time.


          4. Commission. WowBox charges a commission on each booking as per the agreed rate. Payouts are processed after experience validation by the customer.


          5. Bookings. You are required to honour all confirmed bookings. Cancellations must be communicated to WowBox with at least 48 hours notice.


          6. Quality Standards. Experiences must meet the standard described in your listing. WowBox may remove or suspend listings following customer complaints.


          7. Intellectual Property. By submitting images and content, you grant WowBox a non-exclusive licence to use them for marketing purposes.


          8. Termination. Either party may terminate the partnership with 30 days written notice. Outstanding payouts will be settled within 14 days.


          9. Governing Law. This agreement is governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa.
